name: Cawl Marngu
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all the meat and vegetables in a large saucepan covered with water.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to maintain a simmer.
3. Simmer for as long as desired.
4. Add the leek 10 minutes before serving and allow it to boil briefly.
5. Serve the broth in basins or bowls with bread, and serve the meat and vegetables as a second course.
Note: Cawl was traditionally served during winter months in the counties of South and West Wales.
